regime: NEUTRAL macro (regime score 0.55, VIX 18.4, yield-spread +31bp) under a CONFIRMED structural-special-sits Catalyst-Watch tilt: forced-sellers #1 (Russell recon effective today), spinoffs #2, distressed #3, hard-binary/PDUFA confirmed the THINNEST lane (DOGE FDA staffing cuts add unpriced CRL tail risk with NO offsetting options re-pricing). Risk-ON-but-fearful tape (CNN F&G 25), hawkish Fed (no 2026 cuts, hike risk), M&A window open but DOJ politically opaque post-Slater.
risk_stance: Lean into hard-dated, financed, floor-backed event arbitrage where the floor does not float with a macro factor; size the FDA/biotech cluster as ONE shared bet (thinnest lane + elevated unpriced regulatory tail) and demand a real cash/asset floor before paying up; treat undated 'soft-extended' spins/activist processes as wait-for-the-dating-event watchlist names, not aggressive entries; widen break assumptions on the US antitrust deal (UNF) post-Slater.

assessments.binding_reason: Hard, binding Nov 27 2026 PDUFA for BBP-418 (first-and-only LGMD therapy), Priority Review, no AdCom, Phase 3 FORTIFY hit all endpoints — and uniquely for the biotech cluster the floor is a REAL commercial franchise (Attruby ~$180M/qtr +392% YoY) + $940M cash, so a CRL trims one driver rather than wiping out; ~4:1 asymmetry.

Signed, definitive $1.52B Long Ridge sale to MARA (4/30/26) mechanically deleverages a willing seller into a wide-moat short-line rail pure-play; live ~$4.95 vs ~$9 deleveraged value, ~3.9:1; the purest standalone (non-FDA, non-macro) asymmetry in the funnel — only timing risk is FERC/PJM conditioning, not a thesis break.

LUCIDITY Phase 3 (avexitide, PBH) fully enrolled, 16-week design, FDA-agreed endpoint, Breakthrough, topline ~baked Q3 2026; cash to 2028 = no pre-event dilution gun; ~62-75% PoS tilts EV positive — but it is a single-asset binary with the Relyvrio scar, so defined-risk sizing, not pristine.

Liquid-asset floor (Liberty Growth ~$3.4B FMV + holdco cash > the ~$3.7B market cap) means you pay a negative price for the operating stakes; dated Ziggo carve-up (Vodafone buy-in closing ~July 2026, Euronext spin H2 2027) is a committed, Sunrise-proven value-release lever — but it is a voluntary self-restructuring with no hard contractual backstop and a half-year window, so stage in.

Hard Aug 25 2026 PDUFA (1L HER2+ GEA) on a Phase-3-positive, already-marketed molecule, releasing a contractual $250M Jazz milestone; ~$400M gross cash floors a denial — but skeptic confirms it is the drug's FIRST GEA approval (not a mere label expansion) and ~30% of royalties are encumbered by the Royalty Pharma note, so the floor is softer than billed.

Board-approved, dated Jan 4 2027 tax-free spin of Mission Technology Solutions; live ~$33 at the 52-wk trough vs ~$53 parts; spinoff = lane #2 — but skeptic notes Form 10 was still CONFIDENTIAL (public ~Sep 2026), MTS revenue is softening (-5%), and the 'floor' has already printed below itself at $29.94, so it is a sentiment-multiple re-rate, not a defined-risk backstop.

Imminent (July 17 2026, ~18d) binding PDUFA for gedatolisib with a strong, peer-reviewed wild-type effect (skeptic-corrected HR 0.24 / 76% RR, not the dossier's 0.14) under Priority Review — but the stock has already run ~9x to ~$100, compressing the spread to ~1.3:1 raw, and the only HARD floor is ~$7/sh cash, so the $60 'thesis floor' is unbacked; wait for the date rather than chase.

Shareholder-approved C$44 all-cash Zijin takeover with a hard July 29 2026 outside date — but skeptic kills the dossier's central fact: the live gate is NOT routine African sign-offs but China's NDRC outbound-investment approval, actively delayed over the 27% premium and Mali security risk, and NDRC's Mali concern correlates a deal-break with a weak (~$23, gold-tape-dependent) standalone floor.

Two-leg Phase 3 wet-AMD non-inferiority readout (LUGANO then LUCIA, August 2026 window per company guidance — the board's 7/31 date is ~2-4wks early), de-risked by complete enrollment + 3 positive DSMC reviews + cash to Q4 2027; but it is a true coin-flip-with-a-floor, the ~$5.50 floor is only ~2x net cash and softens to ~$3 on a clean wipe, and a LUGANO-win/LUCIA-miss split is unhedged.

The load-bearing event is a SUPPLY RELEASE (final ~$7B insider unlock ~Aug 31 2026) — bearish-on-arrival, and the three prior tranches empirically produced NO re-rate (stock fell ~40% YTD, pierced the stated $17.50 floor). High-quality 40%-grower, but the clean asymmetric entry is AFTER the flush, not in front of it; wait for the wash-out.

Genuine ~190% upside to a $6.17 SoP, and skeptic actually IMPROVES the fundamentals (Q1 organic +0.6%, leverage ~4.0x falling, no activist) — but the LS&H sale is undated, non-binding, single-binary self-help with a leverage-soft (non-contractual) floor on $4.3B of debt; investable only once a signed, priced deal hardens the catalyst.

Soft, undated 'mid-2026' FDA pathway feedback asking the agency to bless a surrogate endpoint it has NEVER established for AATD — a novel, non-binding regulatory-perception binary, not a hard date; cash floor (~$2.83/sh net, runway to 3Q 2028) is real but the register is a serial diluter, so wait for the feedback to land or a capitulation flush.

The big, certain catalyst (Astellas) ALREADY fired and re-rated the stock ~133% YTD to ~$10, above the ~$11.5 base case — the funnel's spread is substantially closed. ECLIPSE 1 (Q4 2026) is a genuine hard-dated binary but a pure clinical coin-flip with only a soft ~$5.5 net-cash floor; entry is after the easy money.

Good $5.1B eye-care franchise trapped under a ~87-88% BHC overhang, but the fast sale path formally DIED Feb 2025 and the remaining spin is undated, gated on a parent solvency test BHC can barely pass (~$20B debt, 2027-28 wall) plus fraudulent-transfer litigation — no record/outside date; buy a parent-distress flush, not here.

The dossier's catalyst already FIRED as a CRL (Jan 30 2026); the '9/30/26 decision' is fictional. Real re-decision is ~Q1 2027 behind an undated, not-yet-filed Q3 Class-2 resubmission — a second swing at the same regulator. Asymmetry to a funded ~$2.75 floor is real (~2.5:1) but there is NO binding in-window event; buy the clock-start, not the placeholder.

REFUTED: the 'forced seller' label is a Delivery Hero event mislabeled onto the Prosus ticker — forced selling is of DHER (immaterial sliver of NAV, already ~two-thirds done at premiums), there is no supply overhang ON Prosus, and the quoted floor (~37.4) is essentially today's price and floats with uncapped Tencent/China beta. A Tencent-discount value play, not a defined-risk event.

Shareholder-approved Cintas merger, but gated on a CONTESTED FTC #1-buys-#3 review (Second Request 6/11/26) with the deadline as far as Sep 2027; corrected floor ~$215 (not the stale $257.91) makes it ~even-money/0.5:1, and ~46% stock consideration (CTAS already -23%) floats the payout — post-Slater opacity demands wider break assumptions. Watch for a clearance signal.

Undated, board-discretionary spin already slipped late-2026 -> early-2027, gated on deleveraging + 'market conditions', and the designated coffee-co CEO is leaving end-July 2026; the hard JDE leg already closed, so no live arb spread; at mid-range ~$33 the reward/risk is sub-1:1 against a soft staples-multiple floor. Watch-list.

REFUTED: the apparent spread is fabricated — only $8.11 is hard cash; the rest is 0.2215 shares of an UNLISTED NewCo bank marked at full 1.00x book in Citi's illustrative range. At a realistic newly-listed-bank discount the ~$13.4 live price IS fair value, the close is a multi-month Fed/Utah/ASBD gate (not days-to-weeks), and a break leaves you holding standalone no-moat equity, not the cash.

REFUTED: the binary already FIRED favorably — FDA approved Lumvoa on June 26 2026, four days early, broad label, immediate launch. The defined-risk window closed; the cash floor protected only the now-impossible rejection case, and the residual gap to $35 is ordinary commercial-execution upside vs entrenched Tepezza, not event asymmetry.

correlation_memo: ONE shared FDA/clinical risk-on-off + biotech-beta factor drives EIGHT names — BBIO, AMLX, ZYME, CELC, EYPT, VRDN, AQST, VIR (plus WVE = nine if you count the soft AATD pathway bet). Seating several is ONE bet, not diversification, and it is the regime's THINNEST, most-tail-exposed lane (DOGE FDA staffing cuts add unpriced CRL risk with no offsetting options re-pricing). Within the cluster, separate them by dated-ness and floor quality: BBIO (hard PDUFA + a REAL commercial franchise floor) and ZYME (hard PDUFA + contractual $250M milestone) are the seatable cores; AMLX/EYPT/CELC are dated true binaries with soft cash-only floors (size as defined-risk, NOT as add-on bets to BBIO); VIR's spread is spent; AQST/WVE are undated/soft; VRDN has already fired. Cap total cluster exposure as if it were a single position. The forced-seller / idiosyncratic names are far more independent of each other and of the FDA factor: FIP (signed power-plant sale -> rail deleverage) and LBTYK (liquid-asset floor + dated Ziggo spin) are the PUREST STANDALONE ASYMMETRIES in the funnel — each resolves on its own corporate clock, not a shared macro driver. KBR (defense/energy spin) is also largely idiosyncratic. The remaining 'forced seller' tags are weaker than labeled: PRX.AS is really uncapped Tencent/China beta, BLCO floats with parent-BHC distress, FIG is post-IPO supply mechanics (its own clock, bearish-on-arrival), CLVT/KDP are undated self-help. The two Deal-completion arbs (AAUC, UNF) and GDOT carry idiosyncratic regulatory gates — AAUC on China NDRC (a sovereign-discretion correlated to its own Mali floor risk), UNF on contested FTC antitrust, GDOT on a fabricated unlisted-stub spread.
memo: THE HEADLINE: across 20 event-driven names the priced-quality bands were once again NOT breached. ZERO names earned a Director score >=80 (n_dir80=0). Eight earned CRO verdict A (BBIO, FIP, AMLX, EYPT, ZYME, CELC, AAUC, KBR — n_verdict_a=8) and four earned CRO conviction 5 (BBIO, FIP, EYPT, ZYME — n_conv5=4), but every one of those was hard-capped below 80 by the Skeptic: BBIO 78 (the single highest, capped by a 2027 convertible overhang and a Street ceiling ~$96 below the $105 high-case), FIP 75 (financing-of-buyer + unverified outside-date corrections), EYPT 55 (date ~3wks early + soft ~2x-cash floor that softens to net cash on a wipe), ZYME 60 (first-ever GEA approval not a label expansion + royalty-encumbered floor), CELC 60 (effect size overstated HR 0.24 not 0.14, ~$7 cash-only hard floor, spread compressed after a 9x run), KBR 60 (Form 10 still confidential, MTS softening, floor already pierced at $29.94), AAUC 55 (the live gate is contested China NDRC, not African paperwork, correlated to a thin gold-tape floor). This is the conviction-ceiling pattern holding for names 408-427: a Director 80 needs an imminent, hard-dated catalyst with a HUGE live-to-target spread AND a hard contractual floor, and a priced tape with a skeptic-with-teeth simply does not offer it — every A-grade biotech binary has a soft cash-only floor (you can lose 60-75%), every clean deleverage/spin has a non-contractual (sentiment/market-multiple) floor, and the one genuine cash-deal (AAUC) carries a contested sovereign-discretion gate. The closest any name came was BBIO at 78, precisely because it is the only binary whose downside is backstopped by a real, growing, already-commercial franchise rather than just cash — and even it fell 2 points short. SEATABLE NOW (aggressive entry, defined-risk sizing): BBIO and FIP. SCALE IN: AMLX, LBTYK, ZYME, KBR. WAIT FOR THE DATE/WASH-OUT: CELC, AAUC, EYPT (imminent but spread-compressed / soft floor), plus the soft-extended FIG/CLVT/WVE/VIR/BLCO. PASS: VRDN (fired), PRX.AS & GDOT (refuted, fabricated/mislabeled spreads), KDP (undated, sub-1:1), UNF (even-money into a contested FTC fight), AQST (catalyst already fired as a CRL). Net: the funnel surfaced two genuinely seatable standalone asymmetries (FIP, BBIO) and a credible second tier, but produced no table-pounder — consistent with a priced market where the asymmetry is real but the cushion never is.
